title: How to delete a board?
excerpt: It’s possible delete or update a board?

posts.author: Cesar (cesar covarrubias)
posts.cookedHtml: It’s possible delete or update a board?

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Cesar – at the moment deleting a board isn’t possible. However, I’ve passed your request along to the product team as feedback.

When you say update a board, what specific details do you want to update?

posts.author: YairFeldman (Yair Feldman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,

We added a new delete_board api (yay!)
check it out here

Enjoy!
